title: YO43 3NA, Mr David Hiles and Mr Alan Hiles: environmental permit issued - EPR/NP3329LG/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Mr David Hiles and Mr Alan Hiles   Installation name: Goodmanham Lodge Farm   Permit number: EPR/NP3329LG   "
